description: ZT411 shows as offline in Windows print queue after network switch replacement
resolution_notes: Port 9100 blocked by new VLAN ACL on replacement switch. Fix: update switch ACL to permit TCP 9100.

description: Print jobs stuck in queue, spooler reports error after driver update
resolution_notes: Driver mismatch after auto-update. Resolution: reinstall ZPL II driver version 8.7.6. Spooler restart required.

description: Ribbon out error on ZT411, printer paused and beeping
resolution_notes: Ribbon spool empty. Physical action: replace ribbon spool and re-thread media path. Resume via front panel.

description: CUPS queue stopped after filter error, lpstat shows stopped
resolution_notes: PPD filter incompatibility with Zebra ZT411 after CUPS 2.4.x upgrade. Fix: reinstall Zebra CUPS driver from Zebra support.

description: Printer unreachable on network, IP address conflict detected
resolution_notes: IP address conflict with another device. Resolution: assign static IP via ZT411 front panel or ZebraNet Web Server.

description: Media out error after media roll change, calibration needed
resolution_notes: Media not seated correctly in guide. After reloading: run calibration (FEED + PAUSE buttons held 2 seconds).

description: Print quality degraded, faded barcodes not scanning
resolution_notes: Printhead darkness setting too low combined with near-empty ribbon. Adjust darkness (~S command) and replace ribbon.

description: Printer offline, Windows cannot connect to TCP/IP port 9100
resolution_notes: ZT411 raw socket port listener crashed. Hard power cycle resolved. If recurring: check firmware version 72.20.x.

description: ZT411 shows error code E2007, printhead temperature alert
resolution_notes: Printhead overheating. Allow 15-minute cool-down. Check ambient temperature (must be < 40C).

description: Multiple jobs printing but output is garbled ZPL text instead of labels
resolution_notes: Generic text driver installed instead of Zebra ZPL II driver. Reinstall correct driver.

description: Printer not printing after firmware upgrade, status idle but jobs not advancing
resolution_notes: Firmware 72.21.x introduced a bug with certain media types. Downgrade to 72.20.x or apply Zebra hotfix KB-2407.

description: ZT411 prints first label then stops, resume required between every label
resolution_notes: Pause mode set to PAUSE-AFTER-LABEL in ZPL2. Disable via ^MMC command or reset via front panel calibration.

description: Cannot add ZT411 to CUPS on Ubuntu 22.04, driver not found
resolution_notes: Zebra CUPS driver not installed. Install: sudo apt-get install printer-driver-zjs.

description: Batch of 500 labels printed with incorrect encoding, barcodes invalid
resolution_notes: Code page mismatch in ZPL stream. Application sending ^CI13 but driver configured for ^CI0.

description: Printer shows ready but no jobs processed after network timeout
resolution_notes: SNMP community string changed on network refresh. Update SNMP community string and verify port 161/UDP open.
